arts.ttl: Rory McIlroy receives invite to parade Masters trophy at Old Trafford as Ruben Amorim hails the Man United fan for achieving the 'impossible'
arts.sum: Man United boss Ruben Amorim sent a video message to McIlroy inviting him to Old Trafford and praised the star for achieving 'something a lot of people thought would be impossible.'

arts.ttl: South American says he had chance to leave Manchester United for Real Madrid – Family convinced him to stay
arts.sum: Manchester United favourite Antonio Valencia has admitted he had the chance to join Real Madrid, but his family convinced him to stay where he was. Marca cover comments from the Ecuador defender today as he speaks about Manchester United, Real Madrid vs Arsenal and how he nearly joined the Spanish giants. arts.ttl: Exclusive: Manchester United & Chelsea on alert as €40m star’s contract talks stall
arts.sum: Manchester United and Chelsea are understood to be on alert as an opportunity seems to have opened up to sign AC Milan goalkeeper Mike Maignan this summer. arts.ttl: ‘Struggling in that chaos’ – Manchester United transfer decision branded ‘senseless’, Red Devils mocked
arts.sum: A day after Manchester United fell to a 4-1 defeat to Newcastle United, Scott McTominay guided Napoli to a 3-0 win over Empoli in Serie A. arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford '100 per cent' wants Manchester United return as Unai Emery makes £40m transfer admission
arts.sum: Aston Villa have the option to turn the Manchester United forward’s loan spell into a permanent one

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim press conference live Man United injury updates plus Andre Onana latest before Lyon
arts.sum: Live updates from Manchester United head coach Ruben Amorim's pre-match press conference ahead of Thursday's crunch Europa League clash with Lyon at Old Trafford.

arts.ttl: Wayne Rooney makes bold Marcus Rashford prediction ahead of Man Utd decision
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford has returned to form at Aston Villa since joining on loan in January but Wayne Rooney is not ruling out a return to Manchester United this summer

arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford performances might be securing the future of another Manchester United player
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford was in superb form for Aston Villa on Tuesday and his performances at Villa Park should be good news for some Man Utd players.

arts.ttl: Lewis Hamilton Man United link strengthens with 'swoop' for F1 legend's former data mastermind
arts.sum: Man United and Sir Jim Ratcliffe could benefit from a swoop on Mercedes Formula 1 team and strengthen ties to Lewis Hamilton

arts.ttl: Leny Yoro sends message after brutal Thierry Henry rant forced Sky Sports into U-turn
arts.sum: Arsenal legend Thierry Henry was slammed for his criticism of Manchester United defender Leny Yoro when he appeared on Monday Night Football following their 4-1 defeat to Newcastle
